# Incident Dashboard Export

The following SVG block simulates a copied monitoring dashboard from an ops review document.

<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 900" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-labelledby="svg-title svg-desc">
<title id="svg-title">Latency dashboard export</title>
<desc id="svg-desc">Large inline SVG fixture used to validate passthrough rendering.</desc>
<defs>
<linearGradient id="latency-gradient" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
<stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2563eb" />
<stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f97316" />
</linearGradient>
</defs>
<rect x="0" y="0" width="1600" height="900" fill="#0f172a" />
<rect x="40" y="120" width="28" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#latency-gradient)" opacity="0.40" />
<rect x="72" y="120" width="28" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#latency-gradient)" opacity="0.50" />
<rect x="104" y="120" width="28" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#latency-gradient)" opacity="0.60" />
<rect x="136" y="120" width="28" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#latency-gradient)" opacity="0.70" />
<rect x="168" y="120" width="28" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#latency-gradient)" opacity="0.80" />
<rect x="200" y="120" width="28" height="20" rx="4" fill="url(#latency-gradient)" opacity="0.90" />

<path d="M40 620 L96 590 L152 560 L208 548 L264 512 L320 486 L376 454 L432 430 L488 404 L544 390 L600 360 L656 332 L712 318 L768 286 L824 260 L880 246 L936 232 L992 220 L1048 208 L1104 196 L1160 188 L1216 176 L1272 168 L1328 160 L1384 152 L1440 148" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="8" />
<path d="M40 710 L96 692 L152 684 L208 670 L264 662 L320 654 L376 646 L432 628 L488 620 L544 612 L600 600 L656 590 L712 580 L768 572 L824 560 L880 554 L936 548 L992 542 L1048 536 L1104 530 L1160 526 L1216 520 L1272 516 L1328 510 L1384 506 L1440 500" fill="none" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="5" opacity="0.75" />
<text x="40" y="84" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="40">Weekly Latency Dashboard Export</text>
<text x="40" y="660" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="24">Shard groups are displayed as dense rect grids to mimic a real copied SVG dashboard.</text>
<text x="40" y="694" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="24">The parser should preserve gradients, paths, labels, and raw geometry without escaping.</text>
</svg>

The copied report above is intentionally large so tests exercise realistic raw HTML passthrough.
